word: G1684 - ἐμβαίνω - embaínō - em-ba'-hee-no - Come into

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐμβαίνω

- Transliteration: Embaino

- Phonetic: em-ba'-hee-no

- Definition:

1. to go into, step into

- Origin: from G1722 and the base of G939

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1722 and the base of G939; to walk on that is embark (aboard a vessel) reach (a pool): - come (get) into enter (into) go (up) into step in take ship.
